scripts.start:all: concurrently -n logs,users,costs,admin -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run start:logs" "npm run start:users" "npm run start:costs" "npm run start:admin"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd services/logs-service && npm install && cd ../users-service && npm install && cd ../costs-service && npm install && cd ../admin-service && npm install && cd ../../
